chunks.text: NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday November 30, 2024 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday November 30, 2024 We are scheduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to apply a ne

e scheduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to apply a necessary update to our NetApp fileserver, from 8am to 12pm on Saturday, November 30, 2024 . All Home directories and Project shares (CIFS/SMB and NFS) may experience disconnection during the update tha

may experience disconnection during the update that may cause data loss on active, open files. Please close your open files and save them before Saturday morning. Services (e.g. webservice) that depend on this storage will also be temporarily down o

nd on this storage will also be temporarily down or unresponsive. When maintenance is completed, NFS clients should automatically resume normal operation, but a reboot should help if they don’t. CIFS clients (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to re

clients (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount filesystems, or simply be rebooted. UPDATE [2024-11-30 | larsrohr ] This work was completed successfully by about 10:00am. Resolved as of 2024-11-30 10:00am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status W

1-30 10:00am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
